title: rubus hirtus var. aciculifolius
intro: Rubus hirtus var. aciculifolius, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan blackberry, is a species of bramble in the rose family that is native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. aciculifolius include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, with the ripe fruit often used fresh in salads or as a jam-making ingredient.
